inputs.label: Mass of Solute
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the solute substance in milligrams, used for mass/volume calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mass of the solute substance in milligrams, used for mass/volume calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çözünen maddenin miligram cinsinden kütlesi, kütle/hacim hesaplamaları için kullanılır.

inputs.label: Solution Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the liquid solution in liters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of the liquid solution in liters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sıvı çözeltinin litre cinsinden toplam hacmi.

inputs.label: Solution Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the solution; default is 1 kg/L for water.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the solution; default is 1 kg/L for water.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çözeltinin yoğunluğu; su için varsayılan 1 kg/L'dir.

inputs.label: Gas Solute Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of the solute gas in milliliters, for gas-phase ppb calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of the solute gas in milliliters, for gas-phase ppb calculations.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çözünen gazın mililitre cinsinden hacmi, gaz fazı ppb hesaplamaları için.

inputs.label: Total Gas Volume
inputs.businessContext: Total volume of the gas mixture in liters.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total volume of the gas mixture in liters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gaz karışımının litre cinsinden toplam hacmi.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
